title: Two Peas April Garden Girl Theme
excerpt: COLOR! As you probably know, I love using colors on my projects. When I was younger, I had several favorite colors. Usually it was blue. Never green because for some reason my mom told me it was bad luck, and…
body:
COLOR! As you probably know, I love using colors on my projects. When I was younger, I had several favorite colors. Usually it was blue. Never green because for some reason my mom told me it was bad luck, and occasionally I would admit to liking pink. You see, I was a big time tom boy. But now, I can safely say that I really do love all colors. And I especially love the Instagram above posted by 2psinabucket.

I was assigned Pastels, and this is what I came up with.

We Are So Happy Here | Copyright Two Peas in a Bucket Be sure to check out the amazing gallery full of inspiration and color! Also, thanks to everyone who's spreading the word and signing up for Mix It Up!
